title: [SV][LowerSeqToSV] MLIR verifier/parer stack overflow in constructing deeply nested if

features.name: deeply nested if-else chain with extreme depth
features.description: Code should include a deeply nested if-else chain with nesting depth exceeding 10000 levels to trigger MLIR verifier stack overflow
features.snippet: if (in[0]) out = 0; else if (in[1]) out = 1; else if (in[2]) out = 2; // ... repeat nesting 16384 times for PriorityEncoder behavior
